description: Create a three-column content slide on the problem-innovation-solution chain, with bullet lists mapping key problems to innovations and resulting solutions.

header.kicker: 1. Power of innovation – Driver of economic prosperity
header.headline: The power of innovation is rooted in its ability to solve important problems for humanity

items.text: Demand for large scale transportation of people and goods
Global warming through rising CO₂ emissions
Higher crop yields through intensive use of synthetic fertilizer
Reduction of CO₂ emissions through the usage of electro cars or storage of renewable energy such as solar
